title: Strawberries & Cream Cocktail
summary: A summery clarified cocktail that's perfect for sipping on in the sun. Or at home on the sofa, You do you.

method.description: Cut the tops off your strawberries and masticate them to a pulp.
Pour in your lime, lemon, vodka, Cointreau (and St-Germain if you like it sweet) and mix well.
Leave this to sit for an hour then strain.
Pour your cream into a new container, then pour your cocktail through the cream, this ensures that all the cocktail is clarified. Let this sit for 3-4 hours to clarify.

Gently pour your liquid through a coffee filter, it will run slightly cloudy at first. Let this happen until it is dripping clear, then strain into a new container. This ensures all your drink is nice and clear and silky.
Re-pour your cloudy initial run off back through the top of the filter. Leave to filter, then bottle when finished.
Pour over ice and serve with a thin slice of strawberry on top.

chefs.name: Toby Clarke
chefs.summary: Toby is Mob's resident drinks expert. Mixology is one of those things that can seem needlessly complicated and nerdy (and involve way too much showmanship) but Toby always ensures his cocktail recipes are simple and delicious. We'll drink to that.
